title: pronephrium tibangense
intro: Pronephrium tibangense is a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae, native to Indonesia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Pronephrium tibangense include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and has also been used in herbal preparations such as salves and poultices to aid in wound healing and skin care.
